title: astragalus macranthoides
intro: Astragalus macranthoides, also known as the Chinese milkvetch or Huangqi, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Astragalus macranthoides include boosting the immune system, reducing fatigue and stress, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus macranthoides can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
